title: Wewoc/Garmin_Local_Archive
summary: Secure, local-first archive for Garmin Connect health data (HRV, sleep, activities). Private & offline. Structured for local analysis (Excel, HTML-Dashboard, Ollama, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM). Your data stays on your machine.

title: hoornet/home-mind
summary: AI assistant for Home Assistant with cognitive memory. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama (local inference). Adds learning, persistent memory, and voice control to your smart home.

title: azerozero/grob
summary: LLM proxy with built-in DLP and regulatory compliance. Redacts secrets before they reach the API. EU AI Act, GDPR, HDS/PCI DSS ready. Multi-provider failover, live TUI, virtual keys, fan-out. 6 MB, zero deps. Rust.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: shimo4228/contemplative-agent
summary: A self-improving AI agent that learns from experience. Runs entirely on a local 9B model. Security by absence — dangerous capabilities were never built.

title: hybridpicker/nex-code
summary: The open-source agentic coding CLI. Focused on Ollama Cloud Models.

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

title: vroomfondel/dgxarley
summary: Ansible playbooks for a 3-node K3s cluster with NVIDIA DGX Spark nodes for distributed LLM inference

title: sleepyeldrazi/little_helper_core
summary: Lean agent harness for local/cloud models. Single FSM loop, 5 tools, Anthropic + OpenAI APIs, skill system. ~3K LOC C#.

title: SonPari1/Search-Engine-Ui
summary: # Search Engine UI![Search Engine UI Cover](Assets/Image/Cover.jpg)**Search Engine UI** offers a sleek and responsive homepage with essential features like a search bar, live weather, and a bookmark manager. 🚀 This project showcases a modern design using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, making it a perfect tool for enhancing your online experience. 🖥

title: JPeetz/Hermes-Studio
summary: A full-featured web UI for Hermes Agent — chat, memory, skills, terminal, approvals and multi-agent orchestration in your browser.

title: DavidPacasCDB/transcribe-meetings
summary: InsightLens transforms business meetings into actionable, searchable knowledge. It ingests meeting recordings, slides, and chat logs, then uses advanced AI to transcribe.

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
summary: Python application that uses local Ollama LLM models to give advice on results found from HIBP (Have I Been Pwned) API

title: Lakatos179/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: ot4ank/auto-openwebui
summary: A bash script to automate running Open WebUI on Linux systems with Ollama and Cloudflare via Docker

title: shashank2122/Local-Voice
summary: A real-time, offline voice assistant for Linux and Raspberry Pi. Uses local LLMs (via Ollama), speech-to-text (Vosk), and text-to-speech (Piper) for fast, wake-free voice interaction. No cloud. No APIs. Just Python, a mic, and your voice.

title: cryptokid980/homelab-2-prod-ai-golden-path
summary: This is a golden path (opinionated shortcut) to explore AI from local homelab to PROD using OSS for technological independence and local LLM for privacy. We explore concepts like AI agents, RAG and LLM using OSS technologies like Linux, Opentofu, microk8s, DAPR, Ollama, TimescaleDB & pgai Vectorizer, Flask and Python.

title: RikyZ90/ShibaClaw
summary: 🐾 A loyal, self-hosted AI assistant framework. Multi-channel (Telegram, Discord, Slack…), parallel agents, MCP support, WebUI with OAuth, and hardened against prompt injection
